fairness: Both engines use the same official xAI grok-4.5 endpoint and OAuth token.
Both engines receive the same transcript, system prompt, tools, tool data, and reasoning level.
Pi is the unmodified @earendil-works/pi-agent-core 0.80.6 package in an isolated cache.
Joi may improve its production Agent Kernel, but test fixtures and Pi configuration stay frozen after baseline.
